backend/main.mo: Main canister defining storage mixin, transient maps, and extensive types for services, vessels, inquiries, company info, tokenomics, gift cards, exports, emails, and redemptions.
backend/migration.mo: Module containing legacy-compatible type definitions for services, vessels, inquiries, gift cards, redemptions, users, and NOC-related structures used during data migration.
backend/users/Users.mo: User subsystem module providing user record types and functions for initialization, creation, retrieval, and lookup using an OrderedMap.
feature_evidence.json: Report detailing feature requirements, associated files, components, and test IDs for recent frontend and backend NOC-related work.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing the purpose and behavior of various frontend files including routes, pages, hooks, styling, and configuration.
frontend/index.html: Main HTML entry point defining metadata, SEO tags, analytics, favicon, and social sharing configuration for the frontend app.
frontend/public/.htaccess: Apache configuration enabling automatic WebP image negotiation, caching, compression, and MIME type handling.
frontend/public/bgkd-giftcard-system.htm: HTML page presenting the BGKD Gift Card System with styling, hero banner, and responsive layout.
frontend/public/image-optimization-repor: Standalone HTML report summarizing image optimization stats with styled sections and lists.
frontend/public/press-release.html: Press release HTML page announcing the BGKD crypto token launch with full metadata and tracking scripts.
frontend/README.md: Frontend documentation outlining architecture, technologies used, and overall structure of the KD Platform UI.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up the React application router and theme provider, defining routes for all main site pages.
frontend/src/components/kd/AdminAddUserC: UI card for adding a user with name and email, using a mutation hook and showing success or error alerts.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Defines the global site layout including header, navigation menus, and responsive mobile menu handling.
frontend/src/components/noc/ComplianceSh: Displays compliance status with VARA licensing info and badges in a styled card.
frontend/src/components/noc/Institutiona: Shows institutional metrics like capital pipeline, market share, and staking accuracy in a dashboard card.
frontend/src/components/noc/NOCAdminSect: Admin panel for viewing total users, adding/removing users, and toggling universal launch state.
frontend/src/components/noc/UniversalLau: Overlay card showing universal launch status, Omni-Mesh status, and a live countdown timer.
frontend/src/components/OptimizedImage.t: React component for serving WebP images with fallback, lazy loading, and special handling for certain assets.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages the backend actor based on authentication, invalidating dependent queries when it changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity context, handling login, stored identity loading, and identity state management.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data through the actor interface.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind layers, extensive CSS variables for themes, custom utilities, and animated metallic gift card styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Initializes React app with React Query and Internet Identity provider and loads global CSS.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Renders About page with company info, values, and styled sections using fetched data.
frontend/src/pages/CareersPage.tsx: Provides careers page with benefits, programs, and a form that submits career inquiries.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Displays contact info, official emails, and a contact form with submission handling.
frontend/src/pages/CryptoTokensPage.tsx: Shows tokenomics page featuring countdown timer, token data, and investor inquiry form.
frontend/src/pages/FleetPage.tsx: Displays a filterable vessel grid using fetched vessel data with loading and image handling.
frontend/src/pages/GiftCardSystemPage.ts: Manages gift card data, authentication, canister info, and user profile interactions with extensive UI controls.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Renders the homepage with a hero section, company metrics, and navigation to services and fleet pages.
frontend/src/pages/KDDashboardPage.tsx: Provides an authenticated dashboard showing user counts, admin checks, and navigation within the KD platform.
frontend/src/pages/KDPlatformLandingPage: Landing page introducing the KD Token Platform with a call-to-action to enter the dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/NOCPage.tsx: Authenticated NOC interface displaying system statuses, DAO proposals, ZK proof actions, and admin tools.
frontend/src/pages/ServicesPage.tsx: React page that fetches and displays maritime service cards with icons, detail dialogs, and special sector sections.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind config extending colors, themes, and plugins for custom maritime UI styling.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing ICP-based multi-canister architecture, features, and current implementation state.
